name: email-drafter-actor
title: Outreach Email Drafter
description: Drafts personalized cold outreach emails using Claude, grounded in hiring signals

input.title: Input
input.description: Email drafter configuration, signal context, and sender profile.

signal.title: Hiring signal
signal.description: Signal object that explains why the company is a strong outreach target.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Resolved contact record that will receive the outreach email.

userProfile.title: Sender profile
userProfile.description: Profile details used to personalize the draft email.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: List of skills relevant to the outreach target.

background.title: Background
background.description: Short professional summary of the sender.

pastWins.title: Past wins
pastWins.description: Concrete accomplishments to reference in outreach.

anthropicApiKey.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropicApiKey.description: Anthropic API key used to generate the outreach draft.
